# Maple Terroir

> Maple Terroir is a third-generation, family-owned Canadian maple syrup company, founded in 1978. It produces single-origin pure maple syrup, triple organic certified by Ecocert, Canada Organic, and USDA Organic.

Maple Terroir is based in Vancouver, British Columbia, and sources its single-origin sap from Quebec's Appalachian Mountains. The company sells pure maple syrup and maple products, including maple cream, maple sugar, maple stroopwafels, chocolates, and gift sets, and ships across Canada and to international markets. Only the syrup line carries organic certification, not the full product range.

## Guides
- [Organic vs Conventional Maple Syrup](https://mapleterroir.com/blog/organic-vs-conventional-maple-syrup): The four real production differences, plus an honest take on whether organic is better and whether it is worth the price.
- [Grade A vs Grade B Maple Syrup](https://mapleterroir.com/blog/grade-a-vs-grade-b-maple-syrup): What the maple grades mean, and which to choose for the table versus for cooking.
- [The Complete Guide to Canadian Maple Syrup](https://mapleterroir.com/blog/the-complete-guide-to-canadian-maple-syrup): How Canadian maple syrup is made, graded, and chosen.
- [Pure Maple Syrup vs Table Syrup](https://mapleterroir.com/blog/pure-maple-syrup-vs-table-syrup): The difference between real maple syrup and imitation table syrup.

## About
- [Our Story](https://mapleterroir.com/story): Family-owned since 1978.
- [Terroir](https://mapleterroir.com/terroir): Single-origin maple from Quebec's Appalachian Mountains.
- [Certifications](https://mapleterroir.com/certifications): Ecocert, Canada Organic, and USDA Organic.
